differential_diagnoses: Metabolic encephalopathy secondary to sickle cell vaso-occlusive crisis
next_steps: Strict blood pressure management to address potential hypertensive emergency/urgency
Initiation of appropriate antiepileptic therapy for seizure control
Review and discontinuation of potential neurotoxic or blood-pressure-elevating medications
Serial monitoring of blood pressure, neurological status, and electrolytes
Evaluation for underlying causes of PRES, including renal function assessment and screening for triggers
